## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Branched from the current intended base
- [ ] No deleted docs/schemas/scaffold files unless explicitly approved
- [ ] No PDFs, source data, generated outputs, or `data/source/`
- [ ] No `__pycache__`, `.pyc`, `.pytest_cache`, or `.venv`
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Any intentionally deleted files are listed and explained
